features: Grass Fed Liver: With 600MG of liver, our grass fed beef liver supplement provides nature's most nutrient dense superfood; Liver is nature's most bioavailable source of vitamin A* (rich in heme iron and B12); Supports optimal energy production, detox and digestion

Grass Fed Heart: With 600MG of heart, the richest source of naturally occurring coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10), these heart health supplements support optimal heart health and are a nutritional powerhouse for energy production

Grass Fed Kidney: Made with 600MG of beef kidney, a potent bio-available source of naturally occurring selenium, B12, and DAO enzymes, this kidney support supplement promotes strong kidney health and the antioxidant defense system and supports histamine detoxification pathways
Grass Fed Pancreas: 600MG of pancreas provides a natural source of enzymes to support healthy digestion
Grass Fed Spleen: This supplement contains 600MG of spleen, nature's most concentrated source of heme iron; Supports a strong immune response and promotes metabolic health
ingredients: Grass Fed Liver (Bovine) 600mg, Grass Fed Heart (Bovine) 600mg, Grass Fed Kidney (Bovine) 600mg, Grass Fed Pancreas (Bovine) 600mg, Grass Fed Spleen (Bovine) 600mg
title: Ancestral Supplements Grass Fed Beef Organ Supplement, Supports Whole Body Wellness with Proprietary Blend of Liver, Heart, Kidney, Pancreas, Spleen, Freeze-Dried Beef, Non-GMO, 180 Capsules
